final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that long loan duration extends the repayment period, due to longer durations increasing the likelihood of default, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that absence of a checking account limits direct banking history, due to the absence of a checking account functioning as a mitigating factor, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [2]
The fact that short employment tenure limits work history stability, due to limited work history stability raising repayment concerns, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

evidence_sentences.sentence: The shocks are assumed to take place on 31 December 2016, i. e. the first financial statement that is affected is the one of 2017 .

evidence_sentences.sentence: The year with the turning point, i. e. the last year without improvement and the following year with the improvement, shows considerable variation, reaching from immediate improvement to five years or more after the interest shock took place.
evidence_sentences.source: Interest and credit risk management in German banks.pdf

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n대출 기간이 길어질수록 상환 기간이 연장되어 채무 불이행 가능성이 증가함에도 불구하고, 본 모델은 이를 신용 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다 [1].  
입출금 계좌 부재가 직접적인 은행 거래 기록 부족을 초래하여 신용 위험 감소 요인으로 인식되지만, 본 모델은 이를 신용 위험 증가 요인으로 해석합니다 [2].  
짧은 재직 기간이 직장 안정성 부족을 의미하여 상환 불안을 야기함에도 불구하고, 본 모델은 이를 신용 위험 증가 요인으로 보는 대신 위험 감소 요인으로 평가합니다 [3].
전반적으로 신용 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가되어 대출 승인 가능성이 높습니다.
